description_long: This is a modern armchair with a contoured, ergonomic design, featuring a deep, enveloping seat and high backrest for comfort. The seat and inner surfaces are upholstered in a dark, textured material with a subtle geometric pattern, providing both visual interest and tactile grip. The outer shell is finished in a warm, wood-grain veneer that contrasts elegantly with the dark upholstery. The chair is supported by four sturdy, slightly splayed black legs, giving it stability and a contemporary look. The armrests are integrated into the flowing form of the seat, offering ample support. This chair would be suitable for stylish urban interiors such as lobbies, lounges, or waiting areas.
description: A modern armchair with dark textured upholstery, wood-grain exterior, and integrated armrests, supported by four black legs. Its ergonomic, enveloping design is both stylish and comfortable.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved wood-grain shell and the textured dark seat with integrated armrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the deep, wide seat, high backrest, and both armrests with visible textured upholstery.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the wood-grain shell and the ergonomic seat profile.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous wood-grain back with no visible upholstery.
